root.1/canonical_standard.json:
{
  "metadata": {
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "source": "Cheonma Legacy Codebase Analysis (v2.4 - v3.1)",
    "description": "Canonical terminology standard for Cheonma Payments Platform"
  },
  "casing_rules": {
    "endpoint_nouns": "kebab-case",
    "error_codes": "SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE",
    "json_keys": "camelCase",
    "environment_variables": "SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE"
  },
  "endpoint_nouns": [
    "checkout-sessions",
    "payment-intents",
    "refund-requests",
    "merchant-accounts",
    "transaction-ledgers",
    "webhook-deliveries"
  ],
  "error_codes": [
    "INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS",
    "INVALID_CARD_TOKEN",
    "MERCHANT_SUSPENDED",
    "DUPLICATE_TRANSACTION_ID",
    "GATEWAY_TIMEOUT_ERROR",
    "AMOUNT_MISMATCH",
    "CURRENCY_NOT_SUPPORTED",
    "REFUND_EXCEEDS_ORIGINAL"
  ],
  "vocabulary_mapping": {
    "checkout": "checkout-sessions",
    "refund": "refund-requests",
    "payment": "payment-intents",
    "ledger": "transaction-ledgers"
  }
}
